items.title: Deterministic Fully-Static Whole-Binary Translation Without Heuristics
items.summary: We present Elevator, the first binary translator that statically translates entire x86-64 executables to AArch64 without debug information, source code, or assumptions about code layout. Unlike existing systems, which rely on heuristics or runtime fallbacks to handle code-versus-data decoding errors
